SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.constants

Enum Class ElfSectionType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ElfSectionType>
net.boricj.bft.elf.constants.ElfSectionType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ElfSectionType>, Constable
public enum ElfSectionType extends Enum<ElfSectionType>
ELF section types defining the contents and semantics of sections.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    SHT_GROUP
    Section group.
    SHT_MIPS_ABIFLAGS
    MIPS ABI flags.
    SHT_MIPS_REGINFO
    MIPS register information.
    SHT_NOBITS
    Section occupying no space in the file.
    SHT_NULL
    Inactive section with no associated content.
    SHT_PROGBITS
    Section holding program-defined information.
    SHT_REL
    Relocation entries without explicit addends.
    SHT_RELA
    Relocation entries with explicit addends.
    SHT_STRTAB
    String table.
    SHT_SYMTAB
    Symbol table.

    Returns the machine type this section type is specific to.

      public static final ElfSectionType SHT_NULL

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static ElfSectionType[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static ElfSectionType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getValue

      public int getValue()
      Returns the integer value of this section type.
      Returns:
      the integer value

    • getMachine

      public ElfMachine getMachine()
      Returns the machine type this section type is specific to.
      Returns:
      the machine type, or null if generic

    • getSectionClass

      public Class<? extends ElfSection> getSectionClass()
      Returns the section implementation class for this type.
      Returns:
      the section class

    • valueFrom

      public static ElfSectionType valueFrom(int value, ElfMachine machine)
      Returns the section type constant for the given value and machine type.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer value to look up
      machine - the target machine type
      Returns:
      the matching section type
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is invalid
